notes: domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅁ+ㅜ+ㄹ batchim. 3 jamo. Teaches ㅁ ㅜ and first batchim consonant ㄹ. Found on every menu and restaurant table. Lesson 1-2 candidate.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅂ+ㅏ+ㅂ batchim. Same consonant initial and final. Ambiguity: also means specifically cooked rice — context note needed.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㄱ+ㅜ+ㄱ batchim. Teaches ㄱ in both initial and batchim positions. Ambiguity: 국 also appears in 한국 — a later review opportunity.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅁ+ㅕ+ㄴ batchim. Introduces ㅕ diphthong. Forms compounds: 냉면 라면 비빔면.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㄹ+ㅏ+ㅁ+ㅕ+ㄴ. 2 syllables. ㄹ initial position. Irregularity: ㄹ as initial is r-like — needs pronunciation note.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㄱ+ㅣ+ㅁ batchim + ㅊ+ㅣ. 2 syllables. Introduces batchim ㅁ in medial position and aspirated ㅊ. Globally iconic — maximal memorability. Best late Stage 1 or Stage 2 anchor.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅋ+ㅓ+ㅍ+ㅣ. 2 syllables. Introduces aspirated ㅋ and ㅍ. Loanword — pronunciation close to English source, learner can verify decoding.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅁ+ㅔ+ㄴ+ㅠ. 2 syllables. Introduces ㅔ vowel and ㅠ vowel. Appears on every restaurant menu. Good for ㅔ vs ㅐ distinction.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅋ+ㅏ+ㅍ+ㅔ. 2 syllables. Reinforces ㅋ and ㅍ after 커피. Shop-front signage.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅂ+ㅜ+ㄹ batchim + ㄱ+ㅗ + ㄱ+ㅣ. 3 syllables. ㄹ batchim. Irregularity: ㄹ batchim pronunciation (dark l-like). Good Stage 2 anchor.
domain: food_cafe_menus. 3 syllables with heavy batchim throughout. Best as Stage 2-3 anchor after simpler words establish batchim concept.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅕ+ㄱ batchim. 1 syllable. rule_payoff: demonstrates ㅇ silent-initial rule — syllable starts with ㅕ sound despite ㅇ written. Every subway station sign.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅊ+ㅜ+ㄹ batchim + ㄱ+ㅜ. 2 syllables. ㄹ batchim. Pairs with 입구.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅣ+ㅂ batchim + ㄱ+ㅜ. ㅇ silent initial review, ㅂ batchim. Pairs with 출구.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅈ+ㅣ+ㅎ+ㅏ+ㅊ+ㅓ+ㄹ batchim. 3 syllables. Introduces ㅈ and ㅎ as initials. Common on all transit maps.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅂ+ㅓ+ㅅ batchim. 1 syllable. Loanword. Irregularity: ㅅ batchim is unreleased t-like stop — important rule payoff.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅌ+ㅐ+ㄱ batchim + ㅅ+ㅣ. 2 syllables. Introduces ㅌ. Good ㅐ reinforcement.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅈ+ㅜ+ㅊ+ㅏ. 2 syllables, no batchim. Reinforces ㅈ and ㅊ. Good for a no-batchim lesson slot.
domain: transit_signage. Jamo: ㅎ+ㅘ+ㅈ+ㅏ+ㅇ+ㅅ+ㅣ+ㄹ batchim. 3 syllables. Introduces ㅘ compound vowel. Essential word — extremely high real-world utility. Best Stage 2+ anchor.
domain: everyday_labels. Jamo: ㅁ+ㅏ+ㅌ+ㅡ. 2 syllables. Introduces ㅡ neutral vowel — the vowel with no English equivalent. rule_payoff: teaches ㅡ.
domain: everyday_labels. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅏ+ㄱ batchim + ㄱ+ㅜ+ㄱ batchim. ㄱ batchim in both syllables. ㅇ silent initial. Ambiguity: 약 also means medicine.
domain: everyday_labels. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅡ+ㄴ batchim + ㅎ+ㅐ+ㅇ final ng. ㅡ vowel, ㄴ batchim, ㅇ ng-final. rule_payoff: best single word to teach both roles of ㅇ — silent initial AND ng-final.
domain: everyday_labels. Jamo: ㅂ+ㅕ+ㅇ ng batchim + ㅇ+ㅝ+ㄴ batchim. Introduces ㅝ compound vowel. Irregularity: ㅝ pronunciation.
domain: everyday_labels. 3 syllables with ㅢ compound vowel. Irregularity: ㅢ in 의 pronounced as 에 in this position. Best Stage 3+ anchor.
domain: media_culture. Jamo: ㅎ+ㅏ+ㄴ batchim + ㄱ+ㅜ+ㄱ batchim. Meta-word — the Korean word for Korea. Ambiguity: 국 also means soup — good contrast opportunity.
domain: media_culture. Jamo: ㅅ+ㅓ+ㅜ+ㄹ batchim. 2 syllables. ㄹ batchim. Irregularity: eo+u somewhat merged in pronunciation.
domain: media_culture. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅕ+ㅇ ng batchim + ㅎ+ㅘ. ㅇ ng-batchim review, ㅘ compound vowel. Common in K-drama context.
domain: media_culture. Jamo: ㅇ+ㅡ+ㅁ batchim + ㅇ+ㅏ+ㄱ batchim. Both syllables start with ㅇ silent initial — good spaced review. K-pop context.
domain: media_culture. Jamo: ㄴ+ㅗ+ㄹ+ㅐ. 2 syllables, no batchim. Irregularity: ㄹ as initial after ㄴ batchim triggers consonant cluster assimilation — important phonological rule.
domain: food_cafe_menus. Jamo: ㅋ+ㅔ+ㅇ+ㅣ+ㅋ+ㅡ. 3 syllables. ㅇ silent initial in 이 syllable. rule_payoff: shows ㅇ as silent placeholder inside a loanword.
